allow: Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'Preflight HTTP %{http_code}\\n' -X OPTIONS http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3001' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: POST' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: Content-Type,Accept')

Bash(curl -s -D - http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login -X POST -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3001' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json' -d '{"email":"admin@acme.com","password":"password"}')

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/login -X POST -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3001' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json' -d '{"email":"admin@acme.com","password":"password"}')

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'HTTP %{http_code}' -X OPTIONS http://localhost:8000/api/v1/login -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3001' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: POST' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: Content-Type,Accept')
